_comment: Symbols we do NOT have a SECURITY_ID_MAP id for but want one. The scrip-master clerk looks each up weekly and reports the candidate rows (exact NSE trading-symbol match only — never a fuzzy guess). Add a symbol here instead of hand-searching a 27MB CSV. Once an id is adopted into the map, REMOVE it here: mapped instruments are checked every run as ordinary rows, and leaving it listed just duplicates the line.

_graduated.GOLDBEES: Resolved 2026-07-20 -> NSE_EQ id 14428 (NIP IND ETF GOLD BEES, series EQ). Adopted into SECURITY_ID_MAP the same day, which unblocked the Wealth-Locking Flywheel merge (wealth_lock now sizes a real paper order, gated on this id's continued verification).
